name: @algochains/sdk
description: Auto-generated TypeScript SDK for AlgoChains MCP Server — 242 tools across trading, ML, analytics, DeFi, and intent-based execution.

scripts.regenerate: npx mcporter emit-ts algochains --mode types --out src/types.d.ts && npx mcporter emit-ts algochains --mode client --out src/client.d.ts

author: AlgoChains <team@algochains.ai>
